stemHtml: During the pre-flight preparation, the pilot wants to plot the longitudinal and lateral CGs at the take-off mass. To make the calculations, he/she looks for the information about the datum and the moment arms of the aircraft and the equipment. Where may this be found?

options.a: Aircraft Flight Manual, Weight and Loading Distribution section.
options.b: Aircraft Flight Manual, Operating Procedures section.
options.c: Reference Table of the Aircraft Flight Manual.
